# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.x     | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

NICE_SCAN is a security reconnaissance tool designed for authorized testing only.

If you discover a vulnerability in NICE_SCAN itself, please open an issue with the label `security`.

Do NOT use this tool against targets without explicit authorization.

## Responsible Use

NICE_SCAN is intended exclusively for:
- Authorized security assessments
- Penetration testing with written permission
- CTF competitions
- Personal security research on owned infrastructure

Misuse of this tool may violate applicable laws.
